kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://fake-json-api.mock.beeceptor.com/companies path_url=/companies headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.4', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '81', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"build": "0", "isbn": "12354", "id": "0", "manufacturer": "CAT", "model": "BLK"}'

POST Response : url=https://fake-json-api.mock.beeceptor.com/companies status=200, reason=OK headers={'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Alt-Svc': 'h3=":443"; ma=2592000', 'Content-Length': '125', 'Content-Type': 'text/plain', 'Date': 'Thu, 28 May 2026 19:24:14 GMT', 'Vary': 'Accept-Encoding'} body=Hey ya! Great to see you here. Btw, nothing is configured for this request path. Create a rule and start building a mock API.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.
